eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CIVIL EMERGENCY MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Mower, MN; at 3:54 PM on JUL 8, 2026 Effective until 4:54 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Mower County, Minnesota- Travel is not advised in Mower County, including the City of Austin due to flash flooding.
